items.name_en: Celine #Triomphe Bag👉TRIOMPHE (French for 'triumph', Arc de Triomphe)💗From the name to the design details, it is an innovative definition of the brand's history💫. Leather shoulder strap, single shoulder/crossbody / Imported calfskin 🐃 Gold metal hardware 🔱 Lambskin lining, brass lock, can be worn on shoulder or crossbody. Interior zip pocket and flat pocket. Adjustable leather shoulder strap. 0891# Dimensions: 18cm/ 22cm

items.name_en: CELINE~22s~New TEEN BESACE TRIOMPHE Embossed Calfskin Handbag
items.name_cn:
CELINE~22s~New TEEN BESACE TRIOMPHE Embossed Calfskin Handbag
The new Teen Besace Triomphe is just too beautiful [Heart]. Unlike the usual square shape, the curved hem adds a touch of softness and a bit of playful cuteness. The capacity is also very good, even a Pro Max fits in~ It looks great with both skirts and formal wear!!
TRIOMPHE Embossed, Calfskin, Sheepskin Lining, Crossbody and Shoulder Carry, Metal TRIOMPHE Closure, 3 Interior Compartments, Interior Zip Pocket and Flat Pocket 16885
Dimensions 18.5 X 16 X 6 cm

specs.rawTitle:
CELINE~22s~New TEEN BESACE TRIOMPHE Embossed Calfskin Handbag
The new Teen Besace Triomphe is just too beautiful [Heart]. Unlike the usual square shape, the curved hem adds a touch of softness and a bit of playful cuteness. The capacity is also very good, even a Pro Max fits in~ It looks great with both skirts and formal wear!!
TRIOMPHE Embossed, Calfskin, Sheepskin Lining, Crossbody and Shoulder Carry, Metal TRIOMPHE Closure, 3 Interior Compartments, Interior Zip Pocket and Flat Pocket 16885
Dimensions 18.5 X 16 X 6 cm
